meanings.definition: the act of concealing the existence of something by obstructing the view of it
examples: the cover concealed their guns from enemy aircraft

meanings.definition: the blocking of one sensation resulting from the presence of another sensation
examples: he studied auditory masking by pure tones

meanings.definition: scenery used to block the audience's view of parts of the stage that should not be seen
put a mask on or cover with a mask

examples: The herb masks the garlic taste
We disguised our faces before robbing the bank
